criteria.reason: Selected provider routes persist into agent_binding_provider_routes and agent_binding_integrations.
Each selected route now creates a localos_connector_action_handler_v1 contract.
OpenClaw route uses openclaw_policy_boundary without user credentials and stays under LocalOS policy.
Maton route requires or auto-binds a saved externalbusinessaccounts Maton key.
The Что возможно panel can choose recommended routes directly.
Focused tests, full agent blueprint suite, and frontend build passed.

commands_run: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_agent_blueprint_layer.py -k 'provider_routes or maton_route or action_handler or service_intelligence' -x
